query:
SELECT 
                            id, account_id, name, 
                            NULL::text as last_name, 
                            COALESCE(NULL, 0) as "zone_id!", 
                            COALESCE(NULL, 0) as "zone_instance!",
                            COALESCE(NULL, 0.0)::real as "y!", 
                            COALESCE(NULL, 0.0)::real as "x!", 
                            COALESCE(NULL, 0.0)::real as "z!", 
                            COALESCE(NULL, 0.0)::real as "heading!",
                            COALESCE(NULL, 0)::smallint as "gender!", 
                            COALESCE(NULL, 0)::smallint as "race!", 
                            COALESCE(NULL, 0)::smallint as "class!", 
                            COALESCE(NULL, 0)::smallint as "level!",
                            COALESCE(NULL, 0) as "exp!", 
                            COALESCE(NULL, 0) as "practice_points!", 
                            COALESCE(NULL, 0) as "mana!", 
                            COALESCE(NULL, 0) as "cur_hp!", 
                            COALESCE(NULL, 0) as "endurance!",
                            COALESCE(NULL, 0) as "str!", 
                            COALESCE(NULL, 0) as "sta!", 
                            COALESCE(NULL, 0) as "cha!", 
                            COALESCE(NULL, 0) as "dex!", 
                            COALESCE(NULL, 0) as "int!", 
                            COALESCE(NULL, 0) as "agi!", 
                            COALESCE(NULL, 0) as "wis!",
                            COALESCE(NULL, 0) as "face!", 
                            COALESCE(NULL, 0) as "hair_style!", 
                            COALESCE(NULL, 0) as "hair_color!", 
                            COALESCE(NULL, 0) as "beard!", 
                            COALESCE(NULL, 0) as "beard_color!", 
                            COALESCE(NULL, 0) as "eye_color_1!", 
                            COALESCE(NULL, 0) as "eye_color_2!",
                            COALESCE(NULL, 0) as "drakkin_heritage!", 
                            COALESCE(NULL, 0) as "drakkin_tattoo!", 
                            COALESCE(NULL, 0) as "drakkin_details!"
                        FROM characters WHERE account_id = $1
